words.clue: Four rounded eminences on the dorsal midbrain (corpora ___)
Large pigmented nucleus in the tegmentum that receives dentatorubral fibres
Structure between tegmentum and basis with dopamine-producing pars compacta
Classic crossed midbrain syndrome with ipsilateral CN III palsy and contralateral hemiplegia
Narrow channel through the midbrain connecting 3rd and 4th ventricles
Only cranial nerve to exit from the dorsal aspect of the brainstem
Superior colliculi are reflex centres for this special sense
Parasympathetic nucleus adjacent to CN III supplying constrictor pupillae
